title: Lmfoust
compiled_truth: Lmfoust is an external contact at [AOL](companies/aol). Over the corpus period (2001-10-24 to 2002-03-15), Lmfoust sent 38 and received 30 emails, totalling 68 interactions. Top correspondents: [Khyatt](people/khyatt) (21), [Kevin Hyatt](people/kevin-hyatt) (16), [Massey R](people/massey-r-worldnet) (8), [Steveswerd](people/steveswerd-aol) (8), [Wtruxillo](people/wtruxillo-hotmail) (8).
timeline:
